title: Asymptotic Time, Space, and Growth · Mastery Check
summary: Predict which ingestion design survives tenfold and thousandfold load increases. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a measured growth-rate decision notebook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define input size and dominant operations for scalar, sequence, graph, and numeric problems.
Distinguish upper, tight, and lower asymptotic bounds without dropping relevant variables.
Simplify sums, products, and nested-loop costs while preserving independent dimensions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
